---
title: "Identity Modernization — Case Study"
subtitle: "Identity plane governance during a large-scale directory migration"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
## Case study in preparation
This case study is being developed. For current coverage, see the [Identity Modernization documentation](../modernization/identity-orgtree/index.qmd) and the [OrgPath Codebook](../modernization/identity-orgtree/ad-to-entraid-tree.qmd).
:::
